metadata.description: Profession-specific AI plugins from The AI Career Lab

plugins.name: pharmacist
plugins.description: Review drug interactions, check dosing protocols, and draft patient counseling notes

plugins.name: physical-therapist
plugins.description: Draft SOAP notes, build exercise programs, and write insurance appeal letters

plugins.name: dental-hygienist
plugins.description: Document periodontal findings, write insurance narratives, and create patient education materials

plugins.name: chiropractor
plugins.description: Chart SOAP notes, draft medical necessity letters, and generate practice marketing content

plugins.name: real-estate
plugins.description: Write listing descriptions, draft client emails, and create market analysis narratives

plugins.name: insurance-agent
plugins.description: Summarize policies, draft renewal letters, and generate claims documentation

plugins.name: bookkeeper
plugins.description: Draft financial summaries, prepare reconciliation reports, and generate client communications

plugins.name: financial-advisor
plugins.description: Build plan summaries, draft portfolio reviews, and prepare client meeting documentation

plugins.name: management-consultant
plugins.description: Draft client proposals, write executive summaries, and turn meetings into action plans

plugins.name: social-media-manager
plugins.description: Generate social captions, build content calendars, and draft client performance reports
